title: La petite Fadette
summaries: "La petite Fadette" by George Sand is a novel published in 1849. Set in rural Berry, it tells the story of twin brothers Landry and Sylvinet, whose separation leads to unexpected consequences. When Sylvinet disappears, Landry seeks help from Fanchon Fadet, a village outcast rumored to have inherited her grandmother's powers as a healer and witch. A promise made in desperation binds Landry to the misunderstood girl, gradually revealing her true character beneath the prejudice that surrounds her. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
